summary: Matched the Zebes Route stage object creation/helper function grZebesRoute_8020B260. The PR added the local StageCallbacks table grZe_Route_803E5DB0, implemented the gobj creation path through Ground_801C14D0, wired callbacks into the Ground user_data, set up the GX link/display callback, optionally registered a GObj process callback, and corrected the header prototype to return HSD_GObj* instead of void.
what_changed: Implemented grZebesRoute_8020B260, replacing the prior nonmatching placeholder marker.
Added grZe_Route_803E5DB0 as a StageCallbacks array with three stage object callback rows plus a NULL terminator row.
grZebesRoute_8020B260 now indexes grZe_Route_803E5DB0 by gobj_id, creates or retrieves the ground object with Ground_801C14D0, and returns the resulting HSD_GObj*.

On successful gobj creation, the function clears Ground callback fields x8_callback and xC_callback, sets up GX drawing through GObj_SetupGXLink(gobj, grDisplay_801C5DB0, 3, 0), installs callback3 into gp->x1C_callback when present, invokes callback0 when present, and registers callback2 as a gobj process with HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54(..., 4) when present.
On failure, the function reports an OSReport error using __FILE__, line number 197, and the requested gobj_id.
Updated src/melee/gr/grzebesroute.h so grZebesRoute_8020B260 is declared as returning HSD_GObj* rather than void.
Added required includes for gr/grdisplay.h, baselib/gobjgxlink.h, and baselib/gobjproc.h.
smart_moves: The matched implementation keeps the callback dispatch table local to grzebesroute.c and uses StageCallbacks consistently instead of hardcoding repeated setup logic per object.
Changing the public prototype from void to HSD_GObj* aligns the declaration with the implemented behavior and allows callers or future decomp work to rely on the created object return value.
The function guards every optional callback before assignment, invocation, or process registration, matching the sparse callback table pattern used by stage object initialization code.
The implementation preserves the original diagnostic behavior with OSReport on null gobj creation, including the fixed source line constant visible in the diff.
decomp_lessons: For stage object spawn helpers, expect a pattern of indexing a StageCallbacks table by gobj_id, calling Ground_801C14D0, configuring Ground user_data callback slots, setting a GX link, invoking an init callback, and registering an update/process callback.
A function previously declared void may need a header signature correction once the matched body shows that it returns an HSD_GObj*; header accuracy can be part of matching.
Stage callback arrays may include a sentinel row of NULL callbacks and zero flags; preserving table shape is important for matching and future reverse engineering.

Includes should be driven by the concrete matched calls: grDisplay_801C5DB0 requires gr/grdisplay.h, GObj_SetupGXLink requires baselib/gobjgxlink.h, and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 requires baselib/gobjproc.h.
naming_conventions: Stage-local callback table named grZe_Route_803E5DB0 follows the stage prefix plus asset/route identifier plus address convention.
Unidentified stage functions remain address-suffixed, e.g. grZebesRoute_8020B260, grZebesRoute_8020B348, grZebesRoute_8020B374.
The gobj identifier parameter is named gobj_id, matching its use as an index into the stage callback table and as the argument to Ground_801C14D0.
The Ground user_data pointer is named gp, a short convention used for ground object data access in this implementation.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used a StageCallbacks table to reproduce indirect callback loads and calls rather than expanding them inline.
Matched conditional control flow by checking gobj for NULL before touching user_data and by guarding callback0, callback2, and callback3 independently.
Preserved exact setup call argument ordering for GObj_SetupGXLink(gobj, grDisplay_801C5DB0, 3, 0) and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54(gobj, callbacks->callback2, 4).
Kept the OSReport string and explicit line number constant, which are often required for matching when debug/report strings are present.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
No PR body or human discussion was available beyond the title, so rationale is inferred from the diff only.
follow_up_queries: Find other stage files that implement a gobj creation helper using StageCallbacks plus Ground_801C14D0 and GObj_SetupGXLink.
Search for remaining void prototypes that should return HSD_GObj* after stage object creation functions are matched.
Compare grZe_Route_803E5DB0 callback table layout with neighboring Zebes or Brinstar route stage callback tables.
Search for OSReport("%s:%d: couldn t get gobj(id=%d)\n") uses to identify similar unmatched stage helpers.
